title: TCM Phsician
description:
Job Advertisement: Registered TCM Physician

Ferragold TCM A Renowned TCM Clinic in Singapore

Join Our Mission to Provide Exceptional Holistic Healthcare

Ferragold is a well-established and respected Traditional Chinese Medicine clinic in Singapore, dedicated to delivering the highest standard of care to our community. We are expanding our team and are seeking a passionate, dedicated, and fully Registered TCM Physician to join us.

About the Role:

As a key member of our team, you will be responsible for providing comprehensive TCM consultations, diagnoses, and treatments. You will have the opportunity to build long-term relationships with patients and make a tangible difference in their health and well-being.

Key Responsibilities:

· Conduct thorough TCM consultations and diagnoses using the Four Examinations ( inspection, listening and smelling, inquiry, and palpation).

· Formulate and administer effective treatment plans, including:

· Acupuncture and Moxibustion

· Chinese Herbal Medicine prescriptions

· Tui Na (Therapeutic Massage)

· Cupping Therapy

· Providing dietary and lifestyle advice based on TCM principles.

· Maintain accurate, detailed, and confidential patient records.

· Educate patients on TCM principles and preventative health measures.

· Collaborate with other healthcare professionals within our clinic to ensure integrated patient care.

· Uphold the highest standards of professionalism, ethics, and patient safety as stipulated by the Traditional Chinese Medicine Practitioners Board (TCMPB).

Who We Are Looking For:

· Must be a fully Registered TCM Physician with the Traditional Chinese Medicine Practitioners Board (TCMPB) of Singapore.

· Holder of a recognized degree or diploma in Traditional Chinese Medicine.

· Fresh graduates are welcome to apply, and mentorship will be provided.

· Experienced physicians with a proven track record are highly valued.

· Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to empathize with patients.

· Proficient in English and Mandarin to effectively communicate with our diverse patient base. Knowledge of other dialects or languages is a plus.

· A team player with a positive attitude and strong work ethic.


Why Join Us?


· Attractive Remuneration Package: Competitive basic salary with an attractive commission/bonus structure.

· Supportive Environment: Work in a modern, well-equipped clinic with a supportive and collaborative team.

· Career Growth: Opportunities for continuous professional development and career advancement.

· Stable Patient Base: Benefit from our established reputation and continuous marketing efforts.

How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and caring TCM Physician looking to take the next step in your career, we would love to hear from you.

Please send your detailed resume, a recent photograph, and your expected salary to:

Email:admin@ferragold.comOR WhatsApp: [+65 98586656]

We thank all applicants for their interest, but only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
